title: Support Aqua360
heading: Help keep Aqua360 online
description: Aqua360 is an independent project, maintained with dedication for the aquarium community. With scientific data from over 788 species, distribution maps, compatibility checker and much more -- all free and ad-free.
pix.title: Support via Pix
pix.qrFallback: Point your bank's camera to the QR Code or copy the key below
bmac.title: Support via Buy Me a Coffee
bmac.description: Hey! I'm Daniel, a software developer from Brazil passionate about technology, open source, and the aquarium hobby. Aqua360 is my independent project -- a free, ad-free encyclopedia with 788+ species, scientific data, compatibility checker, distribution maps, and calculators. Your support helps keep the servers running and everything free for the community!
bmac.accepts: Accepts credit card, debit card, and PayPal.
benefit.server.desc: Your contribution helps pay for hosting and keep the site online.
benefit.content.desc: More species, photos, setup guides and new features.
benefit.adFree.desc: With your support Aqua360 stays 100% free and without ads.
thanks: Any amount makes a difference. Thank you for supporting the aquarium community!
